title: Mushroom Tweaks
description: Adds the ability to craft mushrooms using bone meal and existing mushrooms
body:
# Mushroom Tweaks Data Pack

*Enhance your Minecraft experience with Mushroom Tweaks, a datapack designed to make collecting mushrooms easier and more efficient! No more tedious mushroom hunts - now you can craft mushrooms with a simple combination of items.*

## Crafting Recipe Examples:
Bone Meal + Brown Mushroom = 1 Brown Mushroom
Bone Meal + Red Mushroom = 3 Red Mushrooms

### Crafting Recipes:

**Brown Mushroom Crafting:**

To craft a Brown Mushroom, use the following shapeless recipe:

- 1 Bone Meal
- 1 Brown Mushroom

![Brown mushroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/m8PBOrEK/images/4787031869aad425542dadf1b12fc7435338453a.png)

**Red Mushroom Crafting:**

To craft 3 Red Mushrooms, use the following shapeless recipe:

- 1 Bone Meal
- 1 Red Mushroom

![Red mushroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0b06a03af5db7483bfb2906df0f0293dd3a64d4.png)

### How to Use:
1. Download the Mushroom Tweaks Datapack.
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save.
3. Launch Minecraft and open your world.
4. Use the `/reload` command to activate the data pack.
5. Start crafting and enjoy easier access to mushrooms for your building and potion brewing needs!

### Compatibility:
- No additional dependencies required.

### Simplify Your Gameplay:
Immerse yourself in a world where mushrooms are just a craft away. Whether you're a builder decorating with mushrooms or a brewer needing mushrooms for potions, Mushroom Tweaks adds a convenient touch to your Minecraft experience. Craft, build, and let your creativity flourish!

**Download Mushroom Tweaks now and experience the convenience of crafted mushrooms in Minecraft!**
